hero.badge: Built by raiders. For the whole community.
hero.subtitle: The All-in-One hub for raid scheduling, static recruitment and community.
hero.separator: Everything you need to run high-end content

applications.title: Applications & Review
applications.description: Collect structured signups, compare applicants, and make roster decisions without losing context.

rosters.title: Roster Building
rosters.description: Assign approved players into clear slots, bench backups, hosts, and raid leads for every run.

groups.title: Group Management
groups.description: Manage members, moderators, invites, discovery settings, notes, and permissions in one place.

scheduling.title: Run Scheduling
scheduling.description: Plan high-end content with dates, requirements, visibility, applications, and guest-friendly options.

audience.title: Better for Players. Better for Leaders.

points.verify: Show your characters with trusted profile data
points.apply: Find runs that match your goals
points.groups: Track your applications and assigned runs
points.updates: Follow groups and stay up to date

points.manage: Build rosters, benches, hosts, and raid leads
points.schedule: Schedule public, private, and guest-friendly runs
points.ready: Keep run history and notifications connected

audience.cta_text: From first pull to final clear. We've got your party.
